Headline: #75 74th/75th Temporary Reroute near 75th/Lakefront
ShortDescription: 75 74th/75th  buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near 75th/Lakefront, due to a street blockage near 75th/Lakefront.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#75 74th/75th  buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near 75th/Lakefront, due to a street blockage near 75th/Lakefront.

Eastbound buses will operate via 75th, Coles and line cut.

Westbound buses will operate via Coles, 76th, South Shore, 75th and over normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Trains bypassing Washington
ShortDescription: Blue Line trains are running, but not stopping at Washington due to fire department activity.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Blue Line trains are running, but not stopping at Washington due to fire department activity.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include: 
#22 Clark
#36 Broadway

We apologize for this inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.
